env_files.role: Brochure-style source document with embedded public visual context
env_files.license_note: Wikimedia Commons CC0 1.0 public-domain dedication; verify on the source page before reuse.
env_files.conversion_note: Case-specific text was combined with a cached public image and embedded in a natural PDF; the standalone image file is not exposed as an env file.

source_policy.web_usage_note: Follow web_policy. Closed-env cases should be solved from cached env files only.

notes: Web search is required only for current platform sizing.
